## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO strategy, team coordination, and quick wins for Diligent with growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diligent undergoing major internal reorganization; need for better cross-team coordination](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Focus on improving product page rankings and enriching content for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining blog content while optimizing for authority and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Need for better reporting aligned with business units and focus on improving rankings](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)

## Topics

### Diligent's Organizational Changes

  - [Demand gen team (110 seats) reorganizing from functional to business unit focus](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Tyler overseeing new growth engine: SEO, Geo, and SEM](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Web team working on site migration and CMS update](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Multiple recent acquisitions (Vault, BoardFX, BoardDocs) being integrated](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### SEO Strategy and Challenges

  - [Strong brand SEO, but product/solution pages ranking 4th-5th](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Goal: Improve product page rankings to 1st-2nd positions](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Need for better internal linking and content contextualization](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Balancing blog content with strategic product page optimization](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)

### Cross-Team Collaboration

  - [Multiple teams working on content (SEO, web, content, Diligent Institute)](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Risk of conflicting strategies and content cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Need for improved visibility and communication between teams and growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

### Technical SEO Considerations

  - [Audit redirects from acquired sites to ensure proper mapping](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Migrate high-performing content from acquired sites](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Focus on enriching product pages with fresh, relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Reporting and Metrics

  - [Develop reporting based on business units](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Focus on improving rankings as a key metric](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Connect SEO efforts with CRO to drive tangible outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

### LLM Optimization

  - [Keep content fresh and enriched for LLM signals](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Utilize schema, FAQs, and other tactics to influence LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Balance between product page optimization and maintaining authoritative blog content](https://fathom.video/share/tYRbkDDmiyYG34ZLJNqznDNA_3RqvoRo?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
